Appearances:
Plaintiff AGPM 930 Post L.P. is present. Represented by Matthew Rheinschild.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Young and Rafael Lima are present. **appeared late, was misinformed of the MSC date.**
Attorney Kimberly Shindel appearing for defendants in full scope is present. **appeared late, was misinformed of the MSC date.**

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of December 27, 2016 is vacated. (501)
